worldlineNodes.title: Evidence and response tasks reduce uncertainty

agents.name: Direct stakeholders
agents.stance: Need facts, evidence, and a clear communication channel.

agents.name: Responsible authority
agents.stance: Needs verification, response rhythm, and accountable task ownership.

agents.name: Public and media
agents.stance: Tracks narrative gaps, responsibility claims, and response credibility.

agents.name: Platform and data source
agents.stance: Focuses on data access boundaries, privacy, and abnormal spread.

councilResults.hypothesis: If response remains vague while evidence gaps persist, how do stakeholder reactions change?
councilResults.summary: Council simulation treats agent output as pressure testing only. It raises the risk path when trust and evidence gaps remain unresolved.

reports.finalJudgement: P0 bundle generated a reviewable mainline, world state, council result, and action tasks. High-risk claims require human confirmation.
